label: Hugging Face
description: Run inference against hosted models and access the Hugging Face model hub using a personal access token.

form.title: Connect Hugging Face
form.subtitle: Paste your Hugging Face user access token to enable Inference API and model hub access.

methods.label: User Access Token
methods.description: Paste an `hf_…` token from your Hugging Face account settings. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth client or extra setup needed.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Hugging Face User Access Token

Hugging Face issues personal access tokens scoped to read or write. Most Inference API use cases only need **read**.

### Steps

1. Log in at [huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co).
2. Click your profile avatar (top right) → **Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, click **Access Tokens**.
4. Click **New token**.
5. Give the token a name (e.g. `Anton`) and choose a role:
   - **Read** — query public and private models, datasets, spaces you have access to. Sufficient for inference.
   - **Write** — also lets Anton push models, datasets, or files to the hub.
6. Click **Generate a token**. The token (starting with `hf_`) is shown once — copy it now.
7. Paste the token into the **Access Token** field below.

### Notes

- Tokens are shown only once at creation. If you lose it, revoke it and generate a new one from the same page.
- For Inference API calls against gated models (e.g. Llama 3), you must first accept the model's license on its model card page — the token alone is not enough.
- Tokens can be revoked at any time from **Settings → Access Tokens** without affecting other integrations.
- If your org uses SSO, make sure the token is associated with the correct org namespace.

fields.name: access_token
fields.label: Access Token
fields.description: Your personal access token from huggingface.co → Settings → Access Tokens. Starts with hf_.

fields.name: token_scope
fields.label: Token Scope
fields.description: Match this to the role you chose when creating the token. Anton uses this to warn you if a requested action exceeds the token's permissions.

options.label: Read — inference and hub reads only
Write — inference, hub reads, and hub writes

fields.name: inference_endpoint
fields.label: Inference API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you are using a Hugging Face Dedicated Inference Endpoint. Leave blank to use the default shared Inference API.
